name: Boquete, Panama

visa.notes: Same Pensionado program as Panama City. Boquete is top expat retirement destination.

rent.gigInternetNotes: LIMITED: Fiber expanding but true 1Gbps very limited in Boquete. Alto Boquete has TIGO fiber up to 600Mbps ($64/mo). +Móvil fiber in Bajo Boquete. Most rentals get 100-300Mbps. Finding a rental with verified gigabit narrows the pool dramatically to newer developments and specific fiber-served areas.

groceries.notes: 2 adults + pet food; local markets cheaper

electricity.notes: EDECHI. Much less A/C needed — Boquete at 3,900ft elevation, 55–78°F year-round. Fans sufficient most days.

gas.notes: Propane (tanque) for cooking. No natural gas.

water.notes: IDAAN or community water cooperative. Very affordable mountain water.

sewage.notes: Septic systems common in Boquete. Minimal municipal sewer.

utilities.taxes: ITBMS 7% on electricity. Water exempt for residential.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig). Trash included in rent.

healthcare.notes: Private insurance required (~$175-250/person/mo, higher with pre-existing conditions). Pre-existing condition exclusions common first 12-24 months. Anti-VEGF injections: available in David/Panama City at private clinics. May need to travel for specialized ophthalmology. Pensionado discount 15-25% on medical services.

petCare.notes: Vet visits, vaccinations; limited specialty vets

petDaycare.notes: Hired pet sitter 2 days/week (~$17/visit). No commercial daycare in Boquete. Expat community has informal pet sitting network. Lower cost of living reflected in rates.

petGrooming.notes: Bernese coat maintenance; fewer groomers than city

transportation.notes: Car useful; local buses cheap; David trips for supplies

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, NFL RedZone (DAZN), dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

phoneCell.notes: Google Fi Flexible (US Number) + +Movil Prepaid (Local). 2 phones, 1.5GB+ high-speed data each, all taxes included.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: Private system OOP: specialist visits $40-80, anti-VEGF injections $400-800 each (6-10x/yr) if not covered by insurance. May need travel to Panama City for retina specialist. Pensionado discounts help. Labs $15-30 per panel. Higher costs for specialized monitoring.

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

stateIncomeTax.label: Panama Income Tax
stateIncomeTax.exemptions: Territorial system: foreign-sourced income NOT taxed in Panama.

taxes.notes: Territorial tax: only Panama-sourced income taxed.

healthcare.system: Private (Hospital Chiriqui in David; clinics in Boquete)

pros: No income tax on foreign income
